category_sources: Official repository description matches the idea-capture CLI purpose.
source_facts.description says eureka is a CLI tool to input and store ideas without leaving the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is eureka; official repository name is simeg/eureka and uses eureka for the CLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports ideas, CLI, terminal, and productivity tags.
